query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS onboarding_checklists (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  department VARCHAR(100),
  positionLevel ENUM('executive', 'manager', 'lead', 'coordinator', 'specialist', 'intern'),
  isDefault BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS onboarding_checklist_items (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  checklistId INT NOT NULL,
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  category ENUM('documentation', 'equipment', 'access', 'training', 'introduction', 'compliance', 'benefits', 'other') DEFAULT 'other' NOT NULL,
  dueWithinDays INT DEFAULT 7 NOT NULL,
  assignedTo ENUM('employee', 'manager', 'hr', 'it', 'finance') DEFAULT 'employee' NOT NULL,
  isRequired BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE NOT NULL,
  sortOrder INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS employee_onboarding (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  employeeId INT NOT NULL,
  applicationId INT,
  checklistId INT NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('not_started', 'in_progress', 'completed', 'on_hold') DEFAULT 'not_started' NOT NULL,
  startDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  targetCompletionDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  actualCompletionDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  assignedHrId INT,
  assignedManagerId INT,
  notes TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS onboarding_task_progress (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  onboardingId INT NOT NULL,
  checklistItemId INT NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('pending', 'in_progress', 'completed', 'skipped', 'blocked') DEFAULT 'pending' NOT NULL,
  completedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  completedBy INT,
  notes TEXT,
  dueDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
